creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Work to fix this issue is being discussed in bug #278551 and upstream: https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=114839.

The issue is with the EH_FRAME segment which is omitted. Adding the -Wl,--eh-frame-hdr option on the command line fixes it. Please follow the above two references for more information, in particular to see if the option will be added automatically in the future.

Thanks.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 278551 ***
